content: CCTV footage from VedaCorp’s main entrance and server room was reviewed for key dates: 1. On 2023-03-10 at 10:45 PM, a man matching Arjun Mehta’s build and attire entered the office. He was alone. He went directly to the server room. No one else was present. 2. On 2023-07-18 at 3:12 AM, Rajiv Desai entered the office alone, accessed his workstation, and spent 47 minutes on the server. He left at 4:00 AM. 3. On 2023-01-22 at 9:30 PM, Priya Mehta entered the office and accessed the HR terminal for 12 minutes. 4. On 2023-08-10, 15 minutes after the ₹5 crore transfer, Rajiv Desai was seen leaving the office with a sealed envelope. 5. No footage of Ravi Nair at the office during his alleged leave. Conclusion: Arjun Mehta was physically present at the time of signature forgery. Rajiv Desai manipulated documents after audit began. Priya Mehta accessed internal systems outside office hours.
